basics.name: Armando Peña Tamayo
basics.label: Full-Stack Engineer | AI Automation & MVP Development
basics.summary: Full‑stack engineer with 8 years of experience building AI‑powered tools, internal dashboards, and fast MVPs for startups using Next.js, Supabase, Node.js, and automated workflows like n8n and OpenAI. I focus on replacing manual operations with automation to reduce costs, improve efficiency, and deliver measurable business impact.

work.name: AI Email Automation System
work.summary:
Replaced a manual email workflow with an AI automation system using n8n and OpenAI. Automatically processes emails, extracts structured data, organizes files, and tags messages.

Estimated impact: reduced manual processing time by ~70% and eliminated repetitive inbox operations.

work.name: AI + AR Virtual Tailoring Platform
work.summary:
Built a mobile-first web app for body measurement and virtual try-on using camera input and AR.

Delivered a full MVP in 4 months, reducing time-to-market by ~50% compared to typical product timelines.

work.name: AI Document Generation System (Insurance)
work.summary:
Developed an AI system for automatic document generation in the insurance domain.

Reduced document creation time from hours to minutes (~80% faster) by replacing manual workflows with AI.

work.name: Events Management SaaS
work.summary:
Built and maintained serverless microservices using AWS Lambda.

Improved system reliability and reduced incident debugging time by ~40% through centralized logging.

work.name: Tourism Platform
work.summary:
Developed admin and client-facing Angular apps integrated with CMS and backend services.

Improved SEO and performance, increasing page load speed by ~30%.

work.name: Private School Management System
work.summary:
Modernized a legacy Angular + Rails system and improved development workflows.

Reduced deployment costs by 50% and stabilized releases through CI/CD.

work.name: Reverse Vending Machine Mobile App
work.summary:
Rebuilt a mobile app using Ionic and Angular, improving performance and backend efficiency.

Reduced server costs by ~30% and improved user retention.

work.name: Freelance Projects
work.summary:
Delivered custom web applications for clients across LATAM, including event systems, remittance platforms, and HR tools.

Consistently delivered complete solutions from idea to production.

projects.name: AI Insurance Document Generator
projects.description:
AI-powered system for generating legal documents automatically.

Reduced document generation time by ~80%.

projects.name: n8n AI Automation Platform
projects.description:
Automation platform for lead generation and internal workflows.

Reduced manual operations and improved response time.

projects.name: SaaS Starter Template
projects.description:
Production-ready SaaS template to launch MVPs quickly.

Reduced development time by ~60% for new products.
